profile.name: Eraliyev Doniyor
profile.tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of engineering and technology.
profile.bio: I'm a Mechanical Engineering student with a deep passion for artificial intelligence and bot development. I bridge the gap between physical systems and intelligent software, designing solutions that matter. Currently preparing to apply to the world's top universities where I can push the boundaries of what's possible.

about.headline: Engineering meets intelligence.
paragraphs: I'm a Mechanical Engineering student who fell in love with the elegance of code. What started as curiosity about automation grew into a full commitment to AI and bot development — building systems that think, adapt, and solve real problems.
My work spans physical simulation, intelligent automation, and conversational AI. I believe the future belongs to engineers who can speak both the language of machines and the language of algorithms.
When I'm not studying thermodynamics or training models, I'm designing sleek tools that help people work smarter. I'm driven by a single question: how can this be better?

projects.title: AI Study Assistant Bot
projects.description: A Telegram bot powered by GPT-4 that helps students organize study plans, answer engineering questions, and generate quizzes from uploaded materials.

projects.title: Mechanical Simulation Dashboard
projects.description: A web dashboard for visualizing FEA simulation results, built with Next.js. Engineers can upload simulation data and instantly view stress distribution maps.

projects.title: Smart Expense Tracker Bot
projects.description: A Telegram bot that tracks personal expenses using NLP to parse natural language inputs. Generates weekly reports and spending analytics.
